topic.name: Bicycle Dynamics and Skills
topic.description: The cluster focuses on the dynamics of bicycles and motorcycles along with advanced skills in football, particularly the bicycle kick.

Document 1: Bicycle kick is a physical move in association football.
Its complexity and uncommon performance in competitive football matches makes it one of association football's most celebrated skills.
Document 2: Bicycle and motorcycle dynamics is the science of the motion of bicycles and motorcycles and their components.
Dynamics is a branch of classical mechanics, which in turn is a branch of physics.
